mission.title: helm: helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with "bad math expression: operand expected"
mission.description: helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with "bad math expression: operand expected". This issue affects 61+ users.

steps.title: Identify helm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your helm installation:
```bash
helm version --short
helm repo list
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant helm configuration:
I noticed helm completion in zsh is not working.
One part of the problem is that _helm is not executable per default.

steps.title: Apply the fix for helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with "bad math…
steps.description:
Small fix.  Removes quotes in aliashash keys to work with ZSH.
```yaml
helm _helm_root_command:12: bad math expression: operand expected at `"del"'
```

steps.title: Confirm helm completion fails in zsh (prezto) with "bad… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test helm to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Small fix.  Removes quotes in aliashash keys to work with ZSH.
codeSnippets: helm _helm_root_command:12: bad math expression: operand expected at `"del"'

prerequisites.description: A working helm installation or development environment.
